Localization.Description: Attempt to change or delete the update restrictions for an object

EventDescriptions.EventDescription: Administrator {subject.account.name} changed the update restrictions for an object on host {event_src.host}
Administrator {subject.account.name} failed to change the update restrictions for an object on host {event_src.host}
Administrator {subject.account.name} deleted the update restrictions for an object on host {event_src.host}
Administrator {subject.account.name} failed to delete the update restrictions for an object on host {event_src.host}
